<Badge text="vue" variant="note" /> <Badge text="18 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Inspect first" variant="caution" /> <Badge text="inspect-then-install" variant="default" />

> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add antfu/skills --skill vue -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/vue`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/vue.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add antfu/skills --skill vue -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Vue.js core skill covering reactivity, components, Composition API. Generated from vuejs/docs. Unopinionated with focus on modern (TS, ESM, Composition). Part of comprehensive Vue/Vite one-stop in antfu/skills. Marked inspect-then-install in catalog.

## Install Prerequisites

`npx skills add antfu/skills --skill vue -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`. status=inspect-then-install; selector=named (or source-spec for some).

## Upstream Maintainer

antfu (Anthony Fu, github.com/antfu/skills). 5.3k stars. MIT (skills/scripts); vendored retain upstream licenses. Proof-of-concept using git submodules + sync from official docs (vuejs, vitejs, vitest-dev, slidevjs etc.) for reliable/up-to-date context. Primarily Vite/Nuxt ecosystem focus. POC; author welcomes feedback on real-world performance.

## Comparable Alternatives

nuxt, pinia, vueuse-functions, vue-best-practices (same source); other framework core skills.

&gt; Web-augmented research; evidence only, not authority. Config in external-skills.md is authoritative for install.
